invariant                implies(busy=>active): holds
invariant                mutex(busy,loud): violated at busy|loud via [activate work report]
invariant                never(offline): violated at offline via []
reachability             active: reachable via [activate]
reachability             busy: reachable via [activate]
reachability             idle: reachable via [activate]
reachability             loud: reachable via [activate]
reachability             offline: reachable via []
reachability             silent: reachable via [activate]
